title: feat(mastracode): allow overriding memory instance via config
summary: Adds an optional `memory` property to `MastraCodeConfig` interface that allows callers to supply their own memory instance or dynamic factory instead of using the built-in `getDynamicMemory`. When not provided, existing behavior is preserved via nullish coalescing (`config?.memory ?? getDynamicMemory(storage)`). The change is a single file, 11-line addition to `mastracode/src/index.ts`. Authored with assistance from Augment Code.
maintainerNotes: Very small, backward-compatible change. The implementation is clean — adds a typed optional property to the config interface with good JSDoc and uses nullish coalescing for the fallback. No tests added, but the change is trivial and purely additive. Missing a changeset (flagged by changeset-bot). CI checks are stuck in PENDING state (Core, E2E, MCP, Memory, RAG tests never ran — likely needs secrets authorization from a maintainer). Vercel deploy also needs authorization. CodeRabbit review passed with no actionable comments. Should request the author add a changeset before merging.
